title: Code Factory: Proof-by-Sabotage Software Factory
description:
Code Factory is a local-first, open-source workflow for turning specifications, behavior checks, design-token contracts, policy verification, and release receipts into auditable software delivery. Version 0.16 adds Product Missions, the Signal Loop, and signed Capability Packs: a deterministic PRD-to-Product-Graph compiler, exact dependency-ordered value slices, owner-controlled Opinion Dock triage, supervised Loop Passport handoffs, approval-ready mission decisions, independent creator-verifier completion, evidence-linked PR drafts, hash-linked outcomes, actionable failure summaries, Meter v2 flow telemetry, and pack-derived worker, web, Expo mobile, and supervised agent UI targets. Capability Packs bind complete file maps to offline DSSE Ed25519 signatures and must reject structural mutations before installation. Factory Studio, VS Code, and JetBrains IDEs expose the same bounded workflow. This source release includes public documentation assets, Mermaid diagrams, exact Studio captures, and a reproducible 60-second narrated Remotion quick start built from the shipped UI.

Evidence boundary: environmental content is accepted only as explicitly supplied untrusted local data. This release does not scrape, poll, schedule, authenticate connectors, invoke models, execute agents, or grant merge, deployment, publication, signing, credential, connector, or external-message authority. Capability Pack validation and installation grant no runtime or release authority. Safe auto-resolution cannot invent product facts or approve external effects. Outcome records preserve measured, observed, modeled, and unknown evidence classes. A passing receipt does not prove an arbitrary production environment.

Dual licensed under MIT or Apache-2.0.
